race.name: Grand Mesa 10km Classic
race.tagline: A short but scenic classic-only race on the world's largest flat-topped mountain — Grand Mesa's high-altitude snow fields deliver reliable Colorado Nordic skiing.

climate.description: Grand Mesa at 10,000+ feet receives heavy snowfall and maintains reliable conditions. Part of the Southwest Nordic Race Series.

course.primary: 10km classic course on Grand Mesa, the world's largest flat-topped mountain. Rolling terrain at high altitude through spruce-fir forest.
features: Part of Southwest Nordic Race Series

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Unique high-altitude venue on the world's largest flat-topped mountain, but very small field and short distance limit the score.

history.summary: The Grand Mesa 10km Classic is part of the Southwest Nordic Race Series, held on the world's largest flat-topped mountain in western Colorado. A small but unique high-altitude Nordic racing venue.
notable_facts: Held on Grand Mesa, the world's largest flat-topped mountain
Part of the Southwest Nordic Race Series
Small classic-only race in western Colorado
